sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُنَا الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ فِي حَلِّ مَشَاكِلَ مُعَقَّدَةٍ كَثِيرَةٍ بِسُرْعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Vještačka inteligencija nam pomaže da brzo riješimo mnoge složene probleme.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence helps us solve many complex problems quickly.

sentences.arabic: تَسْتَخْدِمُ الشَّرِكَاتُ الْحَدِيثَةُ هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَّةَ لِتَحْسِينِ خِدْمَاتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Moderne kompanije koriste ovu tehnologiju kako bi poboljšale svoje usluge.
sentences.translationEn: Modern companies use this technology to improve their services.

sentences.arabic: فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ، سَتُسَاعِدُ الرُّوبُوتَاتُ الْأَطِبَّاءَ فِي الْمُسْتَشْفَيَاتِ.
sentences.translation: U budućnosti će roboti pomagati ljekarima u bolnicama.
sentences.translationEn: In the future, robots will help doctors in hospitals.
